name: evolution-bay
description: 进化湾 - AI时代段位测试小程序

scripts.build:mp-weixin: uni build -p mp-weixin && node -e "var f='dist/build/mp-weixin/app.json';var j=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8'));delete j.enableShareAppMessage;delete j.enableShareTimeline;delete j.usePrivacyCheck;require('fs').writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2))" && cp -r cloudfunctions dist/build/mp-weixin/cloudfunctions
